title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
summary: Google Cloud unveils Looker advancements for the agentic era, including dashboard agents that automate workflows and insights, shared pre-trained agents, and conversational analytics. Looker grounds AI in a governed semantic layer to enable business users to leverage trusted data in agent-driven applications.
writeup: This video covers new Looker capabilities aimed at the agentic era, including dashboard agents that automate workflows and surface insights, shared pre-trained agents, and conversational analytics. The central point is that Looker grounds AI in a governed semantic layer, so agent-driven applications draw on trusted, consistent data. The takeaway: business users gain access to AI agents and conversational analytics while data governance stays intact through the semantic layer.
